name: Double Ka Meetha
steps: Trim the bread crusts, cut slices into triangles, and fry them in ghee until golden.
Boil milk with sugar, saffron and cardamom until slightly thickened, then stir in the condensed milk.
Arrange the fried bread in a dish and pour the hot sweetened milk over it.
Scatter ghee-fried nuts and raisins on top.
Rest until the bread soaks through, and serve warm — Hyderabad's wedding classic.
